entries.model_or_tool: OpenAI image generation via ChatGPT; gen_id ef4235ab-e564-49a1-a243-6440887cb359
entries.prompt: Original storybook-horror key art of an impossible drowned harbor exposed at extreme low tide, theatrical miniature-diorama composition, carved wet timber buildings, oxidized brass mechanisms, swollen paper details, black tidal mud, dominant narrow lighthouse with one restrained amber beam, visible Bellhouse and lifeboat route, hand-inked contours, watercolor and gouache surface variation, stylized controlled 3D depth, strong readable silhouettes, eerie rather than photorealistic, designed for a living-room horror board-game adventure.
entries.negative_prompt: photorealistic, generic low poly pack, modern harbor, tropical beach, pirate fantasy, steampunk clutter, neon cyberpunk, illegible darkness, heavy bloom, embedded typography, logo, watermark, direct imitation of any existing game or artist
entries.approval_boundary: Concept candidate only. The generated result is retained as a visual-development reference, but it did not satisfy the registered key-art composition because it became a multi-panel presentation board. It does not approve key art, title treatment, storefront use, production integration, or a Drowned Harbor production Tale.

entries.prompt: Playable shared-screen board view of Drowned Harbor at impossible lowest tide, elevated three-quarter camera, storybook-horror miniature town in black tidal mud, clearly separated Salt Market, Bellhouse Square, Lifeboat Shed, lighthouse path, exposed routes with distinct shapes and elevation, wet carved timber, salt-stained slate, oxidized brass, inked contours and watercolor surfaces, controlled cel shading, readable at television distance, atmospheric but not obscured.

entries.model_or_tool: Google Gemini image generation through the project owner's Google AI Plus account
entries.prompt: Create one single uninterrupted wide cinematic key-art illustration in exact 16:9 landscape format. Do not create a presentation board, mood board, concept sheet, collage, triptych, UI layout, infographic, or design document. Do not include any text, captions, labels, legends, swatches, icons, borders, panels, logos, title treatment, or watermark. Scene: at an impossible extreme low tide, an entire drowned coastal harbor town has risen from black tidal mud. Use an elevated three-quarter perspective with coherent geography. In the foreground, show cracked mud, shallow reflective tide pools, a damaged causeway, and four to six tiny traveler silhouettes for scale. In the middle ground, show leaning wet-timber buildings, the Salt Market, a clearly recognizable Bellhouse with one large bell and long vertical ropes, and a Lifeboat Shed with a visible rescue route. In the background, place a narrow tapered lighthouse off-center as the dominant vertical anchor, with an oversized lantern room and one restrained amber beam cutting through pale fog. The waterline should be distant but visibly returning. Style: original storybook horror rendered like a tactile theatrical miniature diorama, with hand-inked contours, watercolor and gouache surface variation, simplified carved shapes, controlled cel shading, and strong readable silhouettes. Materials: wet carved timber, salt-stained slate, oxidized brass, cloudy cracked glass, swollen paper, black green-gray tidal water. Palette: harbor ink, wet slate, fog paper, salt bone, muted verdigris, and very scarce lantern amber. Mood: melancholic wonder wrapped in dread; beautiful, old, and dangerous rather than chaotic. Preserve a clear foreground, playable middle ground, and atmospheric background. The image must remain readable at thumbnail size and must look like original Drowned Harbor key art rather than an asset-pack scene. Avoid photorealism, generic low-poly styling, modern harbor structures, pirate fantasy, steampunk clutter, gothic castle clichés, tropical water, neon, anime, excessive fog, excessive bloom, unreadable darkness, distorted architecture, duplicated lighthouse towers, embedded typography, or imitation of any existing game, film, illustrator, or living artist. Output only the image.
entries.negative_prompt: presentation board, mood board, concept sheet, collage, multiple panels, triptych, infographic, UI, captions, labels, legends, color swatches, icons, borders, title, logo, watermark, text, photorealism, generic low-poly asset pack, modern harbor, tropical beach, pirate fantasy, steampunk clutter, gothic castle, neon cyberpunk, anime, excessive fog, excessive bloom, illegible darkness, duplicated lighthouse, distorted geography, direct imitation
entries.approval_boundary: Gemini comparison candidate only. Generation does not approve the visual direction, key art, title treatment, storefront use, production integration, or a Drowned Harbor production Tale.
